stemHtml: What should pilots watch out for when executing ECAM/EICAS procedures during a flight?

options.a: Some actions are irreversible and can cause damage to the aircraft.
options.b: The possibility of the aircraft's systems malfunctioning during the procedures.
options.c: Some actions are forbidden during flight and can cause a safety hazard.
options.d: Not having enough time to complete all procedures before landing.
